name: google-classroom-auto-archiver
description: Automatic Google Classroom crawler, Drive downloader, and migration archive exporter.

scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run sanitize:check && npm run compliance:check && npm audit --audit-level=low
scripts.check: node --check src/system/engine.js && node --check src/system/preflight.js && node --check src/crawler/run.js && node --check src/auth/login.js && node --check src/export/export.js && node --check src/api/server.js && node --check scripts/sanitize-check.js && node --check scripts/compliance-check.js
